title: Explanation of Evangelion 30
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Explanation of Evangelion 3.0 Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 21, 2012 7:15 pm My own offshoot of those "Explanation of" supplement-style posts. Sources include what we know so far about Eva Q, Japanese wikipedia and Minna no Eva Fan. As a note, I just put the gif together, the actual images aren't mine. Any information or terminology I'm missing or something that's incorrect (plan to add more eventually) let me know and I'll fix it eventually. :) Cast of Evangelion 3.0 Silhouette vs revealed images, from Eva Store 01  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: [MASSIVE SPOILERS] Explanation of Evangelion 3.0 Post by Charsi » Thu Nov 22, 2012 11:56 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Misato Katsuragi Naval Captain of the ship AAA Wunder, former Nerv Col Misato's Anti-Nerv organization Wille exists under the cover story of restoring the ocean to blue after Near Third Impact.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 22, 2012 5:14 pm From what I understand, that's Willie's cover story, yeah. Added character names / images ( http://imgur.com/a/SwgAr#0 ) and seiyuu names as well as character information. Your face when " Pinkie 's " seiyuu was Stocking. No wonder she's awesome.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 23, 2012 5:16 pm Rei Q isn't confirmed to be the third Rei, AFAIK. Asuka says さっきのパイロットね。綾波タイプの初期ロットか。 (The pilot from earlier. She's from an early lot of Ayanami Types?) near the end of the movie, though.

[]: Post by qu4d » Fri Nov 23, 2012 7:04 pm Why do you always say "Willie"? :P

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 23, 2012 7:14 pm Reichu wrote: Rei Q isn't confirmed to be the third Rei, AFAIK.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 23, 2012 9:04 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: So teh Japanese wikipedia is a lie?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Nov 23, 2012 9:20 pm From the other day: Unexplained stuff thread wrote: One more question from me: Japanese wikipedia claims we're dealing with Rei 3 in Q. Japanese wiki Rei Ayanami wrote: 前作において初号機のコアに取り込まれたレイとは異なる、三人目のユイのクローンと「アヤナミレイ（仮称）」が登場。 Regarding the previous work, it differs in that Rei was taken into* Eva-01's core. The third Yui clone "Ayanami Rei (temporary name)" appears.

[]: Post by qu4d » Sat Nov 24, 2012 7:19 am SSD, would you mind if I am making another breakdown of the whole film? With more pictures etc. since we now have quite a few.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 24, 2012 10:56 am I was going to add a lot more stuff (Evas, Angels, etc) to the first post, I just didn't get around to that yet. You can add any film breakdown stuff here so we can have it together in one big thread then I can add it to the first post.

[]: Post by qu4d » Sat Nov 24, 2012 11:34 am (I kinda tried to reconstruct everything but I didnt read the translations yet and I have no real idea when the stuff on the Wunder takes place etc. so it's definitly not flawless) Evangelion 3.0 - you can (not) redo Act 1 Wille wants to get Shinji/Eva 01 down to earth... ...but there are some problems... Mari is Asukas backup in space, but doesnt do a lot. The operation goes on... ...and Asuka owns. The tasseract descends down to earth. Act 2 Shinji is being extracted from Eva 01... ...and gets a nice and warm "welcome". Act 3 But NERV doesn't like that WILLE has now Shinji... ...and sends a new Rei with Eva 09 to get Shinji back. Mari tries to stop them but she doesn't succeed. Act 4 Rei wakes him up at NERV... ...and he tries to bond with her. But she is different. He has a talk with Fuyutsuki who explains him Reis origin etc. But he finds a friend in Kaworu who cheers him up. Act 5 They are told that they can redo everything and head for Terminal Dogma. But Asuka and Mari are there to stop them. Fight fight fight. Kaworu notices that something is wrong... Shinji continues nonetheless and initiates Fourth Impact. Asuka switches to Beast Mode and wants to stop them. Kaworu dies and Shinji is sad... After all the chaos, Shinji, Asuka and Rei walk the red earth... The End

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sat Nov 24, 2012 11:44 am Don't those half-rotted heads Fuyutsuki shows Shinji imply that there's been a lot more Reis in-between? Kinda drives home the horror of how she can really be cloned and cloned again... Also "Rei III" would imply that this is the same character from the original series, but they're markedly different, or well, as different as clones from the same sample come.

[]: Post by deeRez » Sat Nov 24, 2012 2:18 pm qu4d wrote: ...and Asuka owns.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 24, 2012 2:26 pm qu4d wrote: I didnt read the translations yet

[]: Post by deeRez » Sat Nov 24, 2012 2:40 pm Reichu wrote: If it was, he has zero recollection of it... And with the ramifications of Fuyu's info dump, we can probably get away with NOT attributing it to Shinji...

[]: Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sat Nov 24, 2012 11:36 pm SSD, I like your captions. You'd be really good at writing Children's stories.

[]: Post by duo_rei » Sun Nov 25, 2012 1:24 am qu4d wrote: But NERV doesn't like that WILLE has now Shinji...

[]: Post by Marfil » Sun Nov 25, 2012 2:26 am That picture of Rei in the black suit is indeed from the scene duo_rei is making reference. At the end of the movie, when Mark 9 is forced by Seele to infect Misato's ship, Rei is not at that moment in control of the Evangelion anymore.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 25, 2012 7:39 am BTW, upon additional script work, my guess is that "Adams survivor" does NOT refer to Kaworu, but to Eva-13. The phrase comes up when Eva-13 goes all Whore of Babylon. 01:18:06 Damn it! It's entering its pseudo-evolved form! 01:18:09 Guess it's awakening... 01:18:12 It's (one of?) the surviving Adams. 01:18:06 こいつ！疑似進化形態を超えている！ 01:18:09 覚醒したみたいね・・・ 01:18:12 アダムスの生き残りが！ Of course, Japanese Wikipedia says one thing, but various discussion boards go along with "Eva-13". Seems like the best guess for now, unless someone who's seen the film can confirm/deny. And the "third Yui clone" is still misleading, I say, unless we can get confirmation that there is something in the film indicating that Q!Rei actually has an ordinal. It's not in the dialogue, for certain.

[]: Post by qu4d » Sun Nov 25, 2012 10:12 am Yeah, the picture of Rei is from another scene, but I didnt really know what other picture I should have used... just gimme one and I'll replace it :P @reichu: Quite interesting... I mean, we have seen 4 Adams, so they must have ended up somewhere. I can see Unit 13 being one :>
summary: []: [SPOILERS] Explanation of Evangelion 3.0 Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 21, 2012 7:15 pm My own offshoot of those "Explanation of" supplement-style posts. Sources include what we know so far about Eva Q, Japanese wikipedia and Minna no Eva Fan. As a note, I just put the gif together, the actual images aren't mine. Any information or terminology I'm missing or something that's incorrect (plan to add more eventually) let me know and I'll fix it event
